node.statement: FINAL ASSEMBLY (transport.jl + make_plot.jl): For each B in [0, B_max]: (1) Compute nu(B)=n_e*h/(eB). (2) Identify nearby fractions p/q with gaps Delta(p/q). (3) At plateau centers: R_xy=h/(nu*e^2), R_xx~exp(-Delta/(2kT)). (4) Between plateaus: interpolate via semicircle law. (5) Integer plateaus (nu=1,2,3): Delta=hbar*omega_c (analytic, no ED). Output: two-panel plot R_xy(B) and R_xx(B). AB INITIO: plateau positions, gap magnitudes, gap hierarchy, T-dependence. PHENOMENOLOGICAL: plateau widths, transition shapes, R_xx scale. [All sources]
